---
name: AI model evaluation
about: Submit structured findings from running an AI model against AICL
title: "[AI Evaluation]: "
labels: evaluation, ai-review
assignees: ""
---

## Evaluation Metadata

- AI model and version:
- Reviewer:
- Date:
- Branch or commit reviewed:
- Files provided to the model:
- Context/window limitations:

## Evaluation Prompt

Link to or paste the prompt used. Prefer:

- [`docs/evaluation/MODEL_REVIEW_PROMPT.md`](../../docs/evaluation/MODEL_REVIEW_PROMPT.md)

## Summary

Briefly summarize the model's overall assessment.

## Structured Findings

Use the format from:

- [`docs/evaluation/STRUCTURED_FINDINGS_TEMPLATE.md`](../../docs/evaluation/STRUCTURED_FINDINGS_TEMPLATE.md)

### Finding 1

- Severity:
- File:
- Section or heading:
- Problem:
- Why current form is insufficient:
- Proposed correction or decision:
- Downstream impact:

## Unsupported Claims Detected

List any wording that appears to imply production compiler readiness, certified safety, guaranteed agent safety, replacement of all programming languages, official third-party integration, or research-track adoption as canonical kernel law.

## Reviewer Notes

Add any constraints, model failures, or uncertainty that affected the evaluation.
